entity.summary: Cryptocurrency derivatives platform established in 2021 under the AQX identity and rebranded as Flipster in July 2023, continuing as a global perpetuals and spot-trading service.
entity.notes: Independent exchange coverage supports the 2021 establishment year, and official material verifies the July 17, 2023 AQX-to-Flipster rebrand. Current terms identify service providers in Panama and Poland, while older profiles associate the platform with Singapore or Seychelles. HEI retains the existing Singapore origin and medium confidence pending a definitive historical operator lineage.

expected.summary: Singapore-based centralized exchange launched in 2021 and still operating under the Flipster brand.

changes.summary: Cryptocurrency derivatives platform established in 2021 under the AQX identity and rebranded as Flipster in July 2023, continuing as a global perpetuals and spot-trading service.
changes.notes: Independent exchange coverage supports the 2021 establishment year, and official material verifies the July 17, 2023 AQX-to-Flipster rebrand. Current terms identify service providers in Panama and Poland, while older profiles associate the platform with Singapore or Seychelles. HEI retains the existing Singapore origin and medium confidence pending a definitive historical operator lineage.

events.title: The AQX platform lineage was established in 2021
events.description: The cryptocurrency derivatives platform later known as Flipster was established in 2021 under the AQX identity.
events.notes: The reviewed sources establish the year but not an exact public launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

events.title: AQX rebranded as Flipster
events.description: AQX announced a public name change to Flipster on July 17, 2023 while continuing the platform's existing products and services.
events.notes: The official announcement described a brand and identity update rather than a shutdown or customer-asset migration.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange profile for Flipster
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile records a 2021 establishment year and preserves the aqx_derivatives identity marker.

evidence.title: Flipster company profile
evidence.notes: Independent company profile corroborates the AQX identity and 2021 founding year.

evidence.title: Flipster Name Change Announcement
evidence.notes: Official announcement records the change from AQX to the Flipster name and states that existing products and services would continue.

evidence.title: Welcome to Flipster
evidence.notes: Official follow-up identifies Flipster as the platform formerly known as AQX.

evidence.title: Flipster Terms of Use
evidence.notes: Current terms identify Prex Spółka Z Ograniczoną Odpowiedzialnością for Polish residents and Flipster Corp of Panama for other eligible users.

evidence.title: About Flipster
evidence.notes: The official company page verifies the current Flipster identity and active perpetuals-focused platform.
